title: The Beauty of Holiness
subtitle: A 12-Day Devotional on Humility
author: Andrew Murray
description: Humility is not weakness — it is the glory of the creature restored. Walk through twelve days with Andrew Murray as your guide, allowing Scripture and the Spirit to form in you the mind that was in Christ.

title: From the Inside Out
subtitle: A 14-Day Kids Devotional on Humility
author: ABIDE
authorNote: Based on the writings of Andrew Murray
description: Based on Andrew Murray's classic work, these fourteen days invite kids into the simple, beautiful truth that humility is the heart of following Jesus.

title: Slow to Anger
subtitle: A 7-Day Devotional on Anger and Righteousness
author: ABIDE
description: Human anger does not produce the righteousness of God. Seven days sitting with what James means — and what happens when we ignore him.

title: Validated by God Alone
subtitle: A 7-Day Devotional on People Pleasing and God's Approval
author: ABIDE
description: The approval of others is a counterfeit for what God alone can give. Seven days sitting with what it means to be chosen, loved, and validated by God — and what it costs when we seek that from people instead.

title: School of the Seven Spirits of God
subtitle: A 10-Day Devotional
author: ABIDE
description: Isaiah 11:2 describes seven expressions of the Holy Spirit resting on the Messiah. Ten days studying each spirit individually — and how they work together in pairs — to understand how God moves, leads, empowers, and transforms.

title: Lucifer — Light, Law, and the Fall
subtitle: A 5-Day Devotional
author: ABIDE
description: Lucifer was not heaven's worship leader. Scripture reveals something more sobering — he was heaven's chief prosecutor, created to uphold divine justice. Five days uncovering who he was, how he fell, and what his story means for how we live.

title: The Fear of God
subtitle: A 10-Day Devotional
author: ABIDE
description: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom. Ten days sitting with what it truly means to fear God — not as terror, but as holy reverence that produces wisdom, obedience, worship, and intimacy with the One who is worthy.

title: The Blood of Christ
subtitle: A 7-Day Devotional
author: ABIDE
description: The blood of Christ is not symbolic sentiment — it is the foundation of everything. Seven days sitting with what it means: forgiveness, cleansing, justification, reconciliation, freedom, bold access, and new life.

title: Discipleship Guide
subtitle: A 22-Day Foundational Devotional
author: ABIDE
description: A foundational journey through who God is as Father, Son, and Holy Spirit — and who you are in Christ. Walk through twenty-two days of Scripture-anchored teaching on the Trinity, the person and work of Jesus, the Holy Spirit, and your identity as a child of God.

title: The Holy Spirit
subtitle: God With You
author: ABIDE
description: He will not leave you as orphans. Walk through Scripture to meet the one who was sent to be with you — the Spirit of truth, the Spirit of adoption, the Spirit of power and of love.

title: Genesis: The Story Begins
subtitle: Creation, Humanity, and the First Fracture
author: The Bible Project
description: Genesis 1–11 lays the foundation for everything. Watch the Bible Project's animated overview, then spend three days sitting with what it means — for creation, for the human condition, and for you.

title: Genesis: The Patriarchs
subtitle: Abraham, Jacob, Joseph, and the Promise That Holds
author: The Bible Project
description: Genesis 12–50 traces a single thread: God's covenant promise moving through broken, ordinary people. Watch the Bible Project's animated overview, then spend four days sitting with what it means to be chosen, to wrestle, to suffer, and to forgive.

title: Exodus: Rescue from Slavery
subtitle: Egypt, Plagues, and the Red Sea
author: The Bible Project
description: God hears the cry of a people in chains and comes down. Exodus Part 1 follows Israel from Egypt through the wilderness — and reveals a God who rescues, not because they deserved it, but because he heard them.

title: Exodus: Covenant, Law & the Tabernacle
subtitle: Sinai, the Law, and God's Dwelling Place
author: The Bible Project
description: After the rescue comes the relationship. Exodus Part 2 follows Israel to Sinai where God gives his law as a covenant — and then chooses to dwell among a people who broke it almost immediately.

title: Leviticus
subtitle: Holiness and the Way to God
author: The Bible Project
description: Leviticus isn't a rulebook — it's a blueprint for how a holy God can live with an unholy people. Every sacrifice points forward to the one that ended all sacrifices.

title: Numbers
subtitle: Wilderness, Rebellion & Faithfulness
author: The Bible Project
description: Numbers is mostly a story of what happens when God's people refuse to trust him. But underneath the rebellion is a God who is slow to anger and refuses to let go.

title: Deuteronomy
subtitle: Choose Life — Love God with Everything
author: The Bible Project
description: Standing at the edge of the promised land, Moses gives his final charge: remember what God has done, love him with everything, and choose life.
